package rulecoverage

func NegativeAuthOrTenantExtractionDuplicatedAcrossHandlers() string {
    ruleID := "auth_or_tenant_extraction_duplicated_across_handlers"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Repeated auth, tenant, or principal extraction that should live in middleware or a shared boundary helper."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
